name: Double Chocolate Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Grease a large cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt until well combined.
4. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in the butter until coarse crumbs form.
5. In a small bowl, beat the eggs and milk with a wire whisk or fork until thoroughly blended. Stir in 1/2 cup of the mini chocolate chips and orange peel into the flour mixture until just combined.
6. Shape the dough into an 8-inch round on the prepared cookie sheet and dust lightly with flour.
7. Score the top of the dough into 8 wedges with a sharp knife.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Cool completely on a wire rack.
10. Meanwhile, in separate small, heavy saucepans over very low heat, stir the remaining mini chocolate chips and white chocolate chips until melted and smooth. Drizzle each chocolate in random lines over the top of the scones with a spoon. Let stand for 15 minutes to set the chocolate.
11. Cut the scones into wedges along the score lines. Makes 8 scones.
